title: 'Poorly run, piece of ice': Trump targets Greenland again as Iran war deepens NATO rift
summary_full: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.
summary_public: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: as Iran war deepens NATO rift
